title: New Jersey American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation Provide Over $2.2 Million in Statewide Support to New Jersey Communities in 2025
summary: New Jersey American Water today announced that it, along with its employees, provided more than $1.6 million through grants, charitable contributions, and program support to New Jersey organizations last year. With an additional $509,500 from the American Water Charitable Foundation, total charitable support topped $2.2 million, as detailed in the company's 2025 Community Impact Report.

title: Kentucky American Water to Upgrade Water Infrastructure in Lisa Drive Area of Lexington with $1.4 Million Investment
summary: Kentucky American Water is investing approximately $1.4 million to upgrade critical water infrastructure in Lexington on Lisa Court, from the start of Lisa Court to the end of Lisa Drive, and Allen Drive, from Lisa Court to Judy Lane. This project will also include Faye Circle, Carla Court, Mona Court and Lisa Circle. The company is replacing approximately a half mile of aging water main to help ensure continued reliability, water quality and fire protection for customers. The project will repla

title: Merger of two water companies serving NEPA gets hearing in Scranton
summary: The Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission will hold a hearing in Scranton next month on a proposed merger of American Water Works, which is the parent firm of Pennsylvania American Water, and Essential Utilities, the parent company of Aqua Pennsylvania. title: Why Is American Water Works (AWK) Up 4.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: American Water Works (AWK) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

title: Indiana American Water Announces More Than $246 Million Invested in 2025 Statewide Infrastructure Upgrades
summary: Indiana American Water announced today its 2025 summary of investments for system improvements, totaling more than $246 million in water and wastewater system upgrades throughout its service area across the Hoosier State.

title: American Water Works Co Inc (NYSE:AWK) Shows Strong Technical Setup for Potential Breakout

title: American Water Charitable Foundation and Missouri American Water Launch Hydration Station Grant Program
summary: The American Water Charitable Foundation, a philanthropic non-profit organization established by American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., along with Missouri American Water, announced today it is now accepting applications for hydration station grants from eligible 501(c)(3) public charities and K-12 public schools located within its service areas.

title: American Water Highlights Conservation Efforts Infrastructure Spend And Valuation Questions
summary: American Water Works Company (NYSE:AWK) and its subsidiaries are supporting the EPA's Fix a Leak Week 2026 across several states, promoting customer action on water conservation. The company is highlighting infrastructure investments aimed at reducing water loss and improving system reliability. American Water is also taking part in the American Water Works Association New Jersey 2026 Annual Conference, underscoring its role in modern water management discussions. For investors tracking...

title: California American Water Completes $156,500 Wastewater Treatment Plant Upgrade at Carmel Valley Ranch
summary: California American Water recently completed a screen replacement project at the Carmel Valley Ranch wastewater treatment plant, which will reduce energy costs and improve overall efficiency. The company has managed and operated the wastewater treatment plant since 2002, consistently implementing technology upgrades to enhance efficiency and maintain operational excellence.

title: Consolidated Water 2025 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Decrease Y/Y
summary: CWCO misses 2025 EPS and revenue estimates as weaker services and bulk segments drag results despite gains in retail water sales and higher volumes.

title: American Water and New Jersey American Water to Contribute Expertise at American Water Works Association New Jersey 2026 Annual Conference
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., and New Jersey American Water, announced today that several representatives will participate in the American Water Works Association New Jersey (AWWA NJ) 2026 Annual Conference, taking place March 17 through 20 in Atlantic City, N.J.

title: American Water Provides Leak-Saving Tips During Fix a Leak Week 2026
summary: As spring approaches, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., is recognizing the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's (EPA) Fix a Leak Week 2026 by sharing simple, practical tips customers can use to spot and address common household leaks that waste water, drive up bills, and strain home plumbing.

title: Big Tech purchases of carbon credits explode amid AI race, with Microsoft leading the way
summary: Carbon credit purchases by Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft skyrocketed in 2023, based on tracked purchases.
